message:
fix(ci): macOS /etc/hostname → /etc/hosts + Windows error message

- security_fs_escape: Use /etc/hosts instead of /etc/hostname for
  host read security tests. /etc/hostname is Linux-only; macOS
  returns ENOENT before hitting the security check.

- error_handling: Accept "cannot find" in file-not-found assertions
  for Windows ("The system cannot find the file specified").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
